# Hult Cohort Program

> Open-source curriculum and Next.js cohort platform for the Hult Cohort Developer Program — GitHub-native, agent-first, semester timeline.

## Agent entry points

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Primary guide for AI coding agents — repo map, architecture, task routing
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Claude Code pointer to AGENTS.md
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Human contributor setup
- [execution/marketing/site/AGENTS.md](execution/marketing/site/AGENTS.md): Next.js platform
- [execution/ludwitt-hult-api/AGENTS.md](execution/ludwitt-hult-api/AGENTS.md): Phase 2 metrics API
- [execution/admissions-take-home/AGENTS.md](execution/admissions-take-home/AGENTS.md): Applicant take-home
- [execution/hult-cohort-mcp/](execution/hult-cohort-mcp/): MCP server — apply, peer reviews, votes

## Vision & planning

- [PROPOSAL.md](PROPOSAL.md): Full program proposal
- [README.md](README.md): Repository overview
- [WORKPLAN.md](WORKPLAN.md): Tier status and locked decisions
- [DEVPLAN.md](DEVPLAN.md): Production hardening checklist
- [PLATFORM.md](PLATFORM.md): Platform architecture (👍/👎 voting, PR submissions)

## Platform

- [execution/marketing/FIREBASE.md](execution/marketing/FIREBASE.md): Firestore schema and auth
- [execution/marketing/DEPLOY.md](execution/marketing/DEPLOY.md): Vercel deploy
- Live site: https://site-nine-rouge-68.vercel.app
- Site discovery: `/robots.txt`, `/sitemap.xml`, `/llms.txt`, `/manifest.webmanifest`

## Curriculum

- [curriculum/](curriculum/): 16-week program
- [governance/](governance/): Voting, teams, credentials
- [assessment/](assessment/): Metrics, pass/fail
